hero.title:
Art in wood, resin
and functional solutions
hero.subtitle: Handcrafted custom furniture — from concept to finished piece

about.label: About Us
about.title: Craftsmanship embodied in material
about.text: EPO Atelier is a custom furniture workshop in Tashkent. We create unique pieces from natural wood and epoxy resin — from dining tables to storage systems. Every item is handcrafted to individual dimensions and specifications.

items.title: Epoxy Resin Tables
items.description: Unique dining and coffee tables with epoxy resin pours. Every piece is one-of-a-kind.

items.title: Custom Furniture
items.description: Wardrobes, sideboards, and chests made to your dimensions and design. Natural wood, modern finishes.

items.title: Storage Systems
items.description: Walk-in wardrobes, shelving units, and built-in solutions for optimal space organisation.

items.title: Handcrafted
items.text: Every piece is crafted by hand with attention to detail

items.title: Tailored Approach
items.text: We design to your exact dimensions and style

items.title: Natural Materials
items.text: We use only quality wood and resins

items.title: Quality Guarantee
items.text: We guarantee all pieces and hardware

items.title: Delivery & Installation
items.text: We deliver and install finished pieces

items.title: Epoxy River Table
items.description: Dining table in solid walnut with a double pour of blue epoxy resin. The unique river pattern reveals the natural grain of the wood.

items.title: Live Edge Coffee Table
items.description: Live edge coffee table in elm. Minimalist design highlights the natural form of the slab.

items.title: Ocean Table
items.description: Dining table with a layered resin pour mimicking sea waves and ocean depth. Every angle reveals new detail.
items.material: Ash, clear and blue epoxy resin

items.title: Modular Shelving Unit
items.description: Modular shelving unit in solid oak with open shelves. Suits living rooms, studies, and hallways equally.

items.title: Floating Shelf Set
items.description: Floating shelves in solid ash with concealed mounting. Set of 5 in varying lengths for a dynamic wall composition.

items.title: Walk-in Wardrobe
items.description: Custom walk-in wardrobe with open shelving, rails, and drawers. Warm lighting and natural wood create an inviting atmosphere.
items.material: MDF with walnut veneer, LED lighting

items.title: Sliding Door Wardrobe
items.description: Sliding wardrobe with mirrored fronts in a matte aluminium frame. Interior organisation tailored to client requirements.

items.title: Epoxy Wall Art
items.description: Decorative panel in epoxy resin with inclusions of gold leaf and pigments. A one-of-a-kind original artwork.
